Records.authors: Winterhalder, R., Magerya, V., Villa, E., Jones, S.P., Kerner, M., Butter, A., Heinrich, G., Plehn, T.
Records.description: Two-loop four-point function occurring in Higgs+jet production via gluon fusion at two loops, with an elliptic sub-sector. Six propagators: five massive (mass $m$, top quark) and one massless. Four external legs: $p_1, p_2, p_3$ massless (gluons/jet); $p_4$ off-shell (Higgs, $p_4^2=m_H^2$). Has 5 Feynman parameters and depends on four kinematic invariants ($s, t, m^2, p_4^2$). Analytic results contain elliptic functions. Matches pySecDec example elliptic2L_physical. Used as benchmark for neural network contour deformation optimization.
